pin.title: GPIO pin
pin.description: The BCM GPIO number (libgpiod line offset) that should be used as output (e.g. 4 for GPIO4, which is physical pin 7).

chip.title: GPIO chip number
chip.description: The GPIO chip number (0 for Raspberry Pi 3/4, 4 for Raspberry Pi 5). Defaults to 0.

duration.title: Door opening duration
duration.description: How many milliseconds should the lock kept open.
